subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-28 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: Marriage is necessary according to the Law of God, so your plans are most auspicious.
subcodes.first_line_orig: تأمل بموجب شریعت اللة لازمست لهذا خیلی مبارکست در جوانی نتائج و برکاتش
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @chastity and purity
